caption: A man with grey-streaked hair, wearing glasses, black headphones, a white shirt, and a red bowtie with suspenders, sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a black microphone on a stand. In the background, a woman with pink hair wearing a green dress stands near a wall featuring a framed picture of a face and a logo that reads "UNIQUE FASHION". On the wall is another framed image of a shield emblem. The on-screen text "BOSS TALK 101" and a "BOSS TALK PODCAST" logo appear in red and white. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and appears to be speaking, with slight shifts in his head position and facial expressions. The background figures and equipment remain static, and the overall lighting and camera angle stay consistent as the man continues his dialogue.
